headline: Roberto De Zerbi
body: 🚨 Understand no move to Liverpool or Barcelona is planned for Micky van de Ven. Tottenham see the centre back as key part of the project, Roberto De Zerbi wants him to stay. No exit planned this summer. 🎥 https://t.co/9YmdcA5v9x https://t.c
text:
🚨 Understand no move to Liverpool or Barcelona is planned for Micky van de Ven.

Tottenham see the centre back as key part of the project, Roberto De Zerbi wants him to stay.

No exit planned this summer.

🎥 https://t.co/9YmdcA5v9x https://t.co/t2HpIUABtM
